# UC-22.50.45 · FERC Order 893 — Supply chain risk management for BES systems

## Description

Monitors vendor risk assessments, software integrity verification, and patch currency for BES Cyber Systems per FERC Order 893 requirements for supply chain risk management.

## Value

FERC Order 893 requires supply chain risk management for BES Cyber Systems. Continuous vendor assessment and software integrity monitoring provides auditable evidence of supply chain security controls.

## Implementation

(1) Ingest vendor risk assessments and SBOM registries; (2) correlate with patch verification logs; (3) schedule quarterly; (4) escalate unassessed critical vendors. Indexes required: `index=supply_chain`; Sourcetypes: `sourcetype=patch_verification`, `sourcetype=sbom_registry`, `sourcetype=vendor_risk_assessment`.

## SPL

```spl
index=supply_chain sourcetype IN (vendor_risk_assessment, sbom_registry, patch_verification) earliest=-90d
| eval vendor_assessed=if(isnotnull(vendor_risk_score) AND isnotnull(assessment_date), 1, 0)
| eval sw_integrity_verified=if(isnotnull(sbom_hash) AND verification_status="pass", 1, 0)
| eval patch_current=if(isnotnull(latest_patch) AND (now()-strptime(latest_patch, "%Y-%m-%d"))<7776000, 1, 0)
| stats count AS total_items sum(vendor_assessed) AS assessed sum(sw_integrity_verified) AS integrity_verified sum(patch_current) AS patched dc(vendor_name) AS distinct_vendors BY bes_system_category, criticality_level
| eval assessment_pct=round(100*assessed/total_items, 1)
| eval integrity_pct=round(100*integrity_verified/total_items, 1)
| where assessment_pct<100 OR integrity_pct<100
| table bes_system_category, criticality_level, total_items, assessment_pct, integrity_pct, patched, distinct_vendors
```

## Visualization

Table of flagged records for investigation; single-value KPI of coverage / compliance percentage; time chart of trend over the last 90 days; drill-down per responsible owner. Key fields: `assessed`, `assessment_pct`, `bes_system_category`, `criticality_level`, `distinct_vendors`, `integrity_pct`.
